description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages — test, validate, and build — using the docker:git image (with the docker:dind service) for the build jobs and python:3.8 for the other jobs. In the build stage add a docker job that runs on every branch except master, logs in to the registry with `docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY`, pulls `$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:ci` if it exists, and builds the image with `docker build --cache-from $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:ci .`. Also in the build stage add a docker_tags job that runs only on the master branch of the bigapplepy/yak-bak project, performs the same login and pull, builds the image with `docker build --cache-from $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:ci --tag $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:ci --tag $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_SHA .`, and pushes both tags with `docker push $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:ci` and `docker push $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_SHA`. In the validate stage add a migrate job using python:3.8 with a postgres:12 service, sets POSTGRES_* variables, installs tox via `python3.8 -m pip install tox`, writes a placeholder version file, copies the example config, and runs `tox -r -e migrate`. In the test stage add three jobs: mypy (python:3.8) that installs tox and runs `tox -r -e mypy`; py38 (python:3.8) with the same postgres:12 service and variables, installs tox and runs `tox -r -e py38`; and style (python:3.8) that updates apt, installs git, installs pre-commit with constraints using `python3.8 -m pip install --constraint dev-requirements.txt pre-commit`, and executes `pre-commit run --all-files`. Both docker jobs retry once on runner_system_failure or stuck_or_timeout_failure, and the pipeline defines no caches or artifacts.
